title: What is this version of Fly me to the moon
display_title: What is this version of Fly me to the moon
wikitext:
[]: What is this version of Fly me to the moon?             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Wed Dec 15, 2010 4:14 pm I'm talking about the piano version that plays when Misato is listening to Kaji's message at the end of episode 21. What's the name of it and in what soundtrack is it included? Also, off-topic but what are the girls saying at the beginning of the version of Fly Me To The Moon they all sing together.

[]: Re: What is this version of Fly me to the moon?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Dec 15, 2010 4:49 pm shinji_ryoji_89 wrote: I'm talking about the piano version that plays when Misato is listening to Kaji's message at the end of episode 21. What's the name of it and in what soundtrack is it included?

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Wed Dec 15, 2010 4:55 pm Thanks!
